heroHeadline: Zelensky Proposes Easter Ceasefire; 970 Russian Losses on Day 1,496; Ukraine Drone Kills 1 in Taganrog
heroSubtitle: Zelensky calls for Easter ceasefire (April 16) and mutual energy infrastructure halt as Russia rejects talks; Ukrainian drone kills 1 in Taganrog, sparks Volgograd refinery fire; 102 Ukrainian UAVs intercepted across Russia; 970 Russian losses on Mar 31 bring cumulative total to ~1,297,670; Ukraine advances near Slovyansk as Russia pushes on Hulyaipole axis; 147 combat engagements recorded; Zelensky secures historic security agreements with Saudi Arabia, UAE, and Qatar
footerNote: Data sourced from UN OHCHR, ISW, CSIS, Ukrainian MoD, US DoD, NATO, IAEA, and major news outlets including Reuters, BBC, AP, Al Jazeera, Bloomberg, and Kyiv Independent. Casualty figures are estimates; Russia has never released official figures.
